claims.subject: HelixPay SEA
claims.evidence: hubspot was set up after the okta rollout so it uses our standard sso pattern with okta as the idp and group-based provisioning.
claims.object_value: Okta as IdP with group-based provisioning (standard pattern)

claims.subject: HelixPay Brasil
claims.evidence: pipedrive in brasil was set up before okta — back when sao paulo was using google sso directly — and we layered okta on top later, which means the sso flow goes through an extra hop and the user provisioning is still partly manual.
claims.object_value: Okta layered on top of original Google SSO; extra hop; user provisioning partly manual
